records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't even take down a single ghost thrall groveling at the Tiger's feet, let alone stand against the Beast itself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You can't even take down a single ghost thrall groveling at the Tiger's feet, let alone stand against the Beast itself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You can't even take down a single ghost thrall groveling at the Tiger's feet, let alone stand against the Beast itself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lie there with your grudge and watch the world end. The Tiger will soon come to claim your soul.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lie there with your grudge and watch the world end. The Tiger will soon come to claim your soul.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lie there with your grudge and watch the world end. The Tiger will soon come to claim your soul.

Ten seconds until the auger reaches the barrier
8v!

8v!



records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't go for a head-on fight. Wait for an opening.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't go for a head-on fight. Wait for an opening.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't go for a head-on fight. Wait for an opening.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when it comes, bet everything on one strike.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when it comes, bet everything on one strike.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when it comes, bet everything on one strike.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An afterimage?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An afterimage?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An afterimage?

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Kgh
8v!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Kgh
8v!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Kgh
8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
How
8v? I pushed you to your limit!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
How
8v? I pushed you to your limit!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
How
8v? I pushed you to your limit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never aimed to beat you head-on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never aimed to beat you head-on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never aimed to beat you head-on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I waited for the moment you'd swing your sword at the auger.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I waited for the moment you'd swing your sword at the auger.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I waited for the moment you'd swing your sword at the auger.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why cling to such pointless resolve? You're barely holding your own against me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why cling to such pointless resolve? You're barely holding your own against me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why cling to such pointless resolve? You're barely holding your own against me.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
And yet you think you can win against
8v the very Beast you draw your power from?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
And yet you think you can win against
8v the very Beast you draw your power from?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
And yet you think you can win against
8v the very Beast you draw your power from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Winning or losing isn't what matters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Winning or losing isn't what matters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Winning or losing isn't what matters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where the heart leads, the path follows.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where the heart leads, the path follows.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where the heart leads, the path follows.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
The auger
8v has broken through the barrier!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
The auger
8v has broken through the barrier!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
The auger
8v has broken through the barrier!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can feel the current shift. The comms will cut out soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can feel the current shift. The comms will cut out soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can feel the current shift. The comms will cut out soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're counting on you, Seosaeng. All of humanity is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're counting on you, Seosaeng. All of humanity is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're counting on you, Seosaeng. All of humanity is.

Leave it to me. And

Leave it to me. And
